title: Cryptool integrates Radom Network for native crypto payments
content_html:
Cryptool has partnered with Radom Network to bring production-grade crypto payment rails to the platform.

The integration covers the three workflows where teams typically lose the most time: crypto subscription billing, vendor and contributor payouts, and recurring revenue collection. Each becomes a single API call instead of a manual transfer.

For Cryptool users, the result is predictable cash flow in crypto without the spreadsheet work that usually comes with it. Radom Network handles the rails; Cryptool handles the rest of the investment workflow on top.
author: Cryptool
